fused mma的整体方案 overview

A16W4-bf16 map方案

A16W4-S8 map方案

A16W4 量化方案

A16W4 bf16 map和int8 map是不同的量化方案

A16W4 bf16 map的量化方案

bf16 map的量化是在ldgmb cwarp。unpack int32 tensor到bf16后，使用 per channel 128K 的量化方式进行处理。

这种方案的好处是，量化更精准；缺点是，ldgmb cwarp多了大量的vcore 操作，对性能影响较大。

A16W4 S8 map的量化方案

S8 map的量化是在typecast cwarp。unpack int32 tensor到S8后，正常进行mma存到L2，在typecast cwarp对L2的结果进行 per tensor 的scale处理，结果乘以一个scale系数。

这种方案的好处是，vcore操作少，性能更好；缺点是整个tensor使用1个scale，量化不够精准。

A16W4 BF16 map swizzle方案

burst 模式map

排布方法与它密切相关

目标是 kernel 侧load burst4的int32，把int32的burst4的每一行转成 burst8的bf16/S8，然后再stm传过去。

A16W4 bf16 swizzle方案

  • k方向上，设计8个int4 组合成一个int32，然后8个int按照BF16 burst8的形式排列，这样做是因为load一个int32相当于load了一个burst8的bf16，这样可以方便转换后stm到gmb。
  • burst方向上，设计load burst4的uint32，uint32 burst之间按照128间隔，这是因为uint32的burst要拆开成4条burst1，16 eu的1条uint32，要变成 burst8 * 16 eu的bf16。
  • eu方向上，每个eu的相同burst之间需要连续，比如eu0的d0和eu1的d0是连续的，这样也是因为burst4要拆开成burst1→ bf16 burst8，拆开的eu0 d0和eu1 d0，eu2 d0，... 转换成bf168是一笔存出去的，这样一笔bf168存出去的index就是连续的了，这点很巧妙。

综上所述，该方案为在br10x系列支持int4充分考虑了硬件特性和软件特性，充分利用了硬件资源。

这也是为什么不能用这种排布方法：stm出去的时候不是连续的

host 侧 swizzle pack代码

之所以按照 0，32，64，96，1，33，65，97排布，这是因为device convert的时候是32位内部隔4个数组合成一个 bf162， 组合起来就是0，1组成一个bf162，32，33组成一个bf162，64，65组合成一个，96，97组合成1个。

值加8是因为int4数据范围是[-8, 7]，偏移成正数，方便组成uint32

pack

展开源码 
// map to bf162
void pack_int4_to_int32_BF16(uint32_t *Pint4, uint32_t *Pack, int32_t K_align, int32_t W_align) {
    // uint32_t *Pint4 = (uint32_t *)torchBInt4.data_ptr();
    // uint32_t *Pack = (uint32_t *)torchBInt32Pack.data_ptr();
    // std::cout << "torchBInt4 size: " << torchBInt4.sizes() << std::endl;
    // std::cout << "torchBInt32Pack size: " << torchBInt32Pack.sizes() << std::endl;
    for (int32_t w = 0; w < W_align; w++) {
        for (int32_t k = 0; k < (K_align / 8); k++) {
            int32_t base_index = (k % 32) / 2 * 2 + (k / 64) * 512 + (k & 0x1) * 128 + ((k % 64) / 32) * 256;
            Pack[k * W_align + w] =
                ((Pint4[(base_index) * W_align + w] + 8) & 0xf) |
                ((Pint4[(base_index + 32) * W_align + w] + 8) << 4) |
                ((Pint4[(base_index + 64) * W_align + w] + 8) << 8) |
                ((Pint4[(base_index + 96) * W_align + w] + 8) << 12) |
                ((Pint4[(base_index + 1) * W_align + w] + 8) << 16) |
                ((Pint4[(base_index + 33) * W_align + w] + 8) << 20) |
                ((Pint4[(base_index + 65) * W_align + w] + 8) << 24) |
                ((Pint4[(base_index + 97) * W_align + w] + 8) << 28);
            int32_t out_index = k * W_align + w;
            printf("222222 {out_index:%d, base_index: %d, int32_k: %d, w: %d}, data0: %d, data1: %d, data2: %d, data3: %d, data4: %d, data5: %d, data6: %d, data7: %d \n", 
                out_index, base_index, k, w,
                Pint4[(base_index + 0) * W_align + w],
                Pint4[(base_index + 32) * W_align + w],
                Pint4[(base_index + 64) * W_align + w],
                Pint4[(base_index + 96) * W_align + w],
                Pint4[(base_index + 1) * W_align + w],
                Pint4[(base_index + 33) * W_align + w],
                Pint4[(base_index + 65) * W_align + w],
                Pint4[(base_index + 97) * W_align + w]
                );
        }
    }
}

device 侧 unpack代码

可以看到隔了4位，通过ushort2组合成一个bf162

展开源码 
__forceinline__ __device__ void convertInt32ToBF16_x(__short_vector<uint32_t, 4> sv, __short_vector<BF16, 8> &out0, float group_scale) {
    uint32_t a0 = (sv.x & 0x000f000f);
    uint32_t a1 = (sv.x & 0x00f000f0) >> 4;
    uint32_t a2 = (sv.x & 0x0f000f00) >> 8;
    uint32_t a3 = (sv.x & 0xf000f000) >> 12;
    out0 = (__bfloat1622bfloat168((__ushort22bfloat162(*((ushort2 *)(&a0)))), (__ushort22bfloat162(*((ushort2 *)(&a1)))),
                                  (__ushort22bfloat162(*((ushort2 *)(&a2)))), (__ushort22bfloat162(*((ushort2 *)(&a3))))) -
            8) *
           group_scale;
}

__forceinline__ __device__ void convertInt32ToBF16_y(__short_vector<uint32_t, 4> sv, __short_vector<BF16, 8> &out0, float group_scale) {
    uint32_t a0 = (sv.y & 0x000f000f);
    uint32_t a1 = (sv.y & 0x00f000f0) >> 4;
    uint32_t a2 = (sv.y & 0x0f000f00) >> 8;
    uint32_t a3 = (sv.y & 0xf000f000) >> 12;
    out0 = (__bfloat1622bfloat168((__ushort22bfloat162(*((ushort2 *)(&a0)))), (__ushort22bfloat162(*((ushort2 *)(&a1)))),
                                  (__ushort22bfloat162(*((ushort2 *)(&a2)))), (__ushort22bfloat162(*((ushort2 *)(&a3))))) -
            8) *
           group_scale;
}

__forceinline__ __device__ void convertInt32ToBF16_z(__short_vector<uint32_t, 4> sv, __short_vector<BF16, 8> &out0, float group_scale) {
    uint32_t a0 = (sv.z & 0x000f000f);
    uint32_t a1 = (sv.z & 0x00f000f0) >> 4;
    uint32_t a2 = (sv.z & 0x0f000f00) >> 8;
    uint32_t a3 = (sv.z & 0xf000f000) >> 12;
    out0 = (__bfloat1622bfloat168((__ushort22bfloat162(*((ushort2 *)(&a0)))), (__ushort22bfloat162(*((ushort2 *)(&a1)))),
                                  (__ushort22bfloat162(*((ushort2 *)(&a2)))), (__ushort22bfloat162(*((ushort2 *)(&a3))))) -
            8) *
           group_scale;
}
__forceinline__ __device__ void convertInt32ToBF16_w(__short_vector<uint32_t, 4> sv, __short_vector<BF16, 8> &out0, float group_scale) {
    uint32_t a0 = (sv.w & 0x000f000f);
    uint32_t a1 = (sv.w & 0x00f000f0) >> 4;
    uint32_t a2 = (sv.w & 0x0f000f00) >> 8;
    uint32_t a3 = (sv.w & 0xf000f000) >> 12;
    out0 = (__bfloat1622bfloat168((__ushort22bfloat162(*((ushort2 *)(&a0)))), (__ushort22bfloat162(*((ushort2 *)(&a1)))),
                                  (__ushort22bfloat162(*((ushort2 *)(&a2)))), (__ushort22bfloat162(*((ushort2 *)(&a3))))) -
            8) *
           group_scale;
}

 

A16W4 S8 map swizzle方案

有了前面的BF16的例子，我们其实只需要关注S8的burst8在k方向上的排布即可，相同理解。

host 侧swizzle pack代码

对应的host端准备数据代码如下：

解释：

k_div_64 * 512 是64个uint32对应512个uint4 k index，定位512个k整体的位置；

(k_mod_64 >> 5) * 256 是64个k内部分成上32和下32，两者之间坐标隔了256；

(k & 1) * 128 是上下32个k内部奇偶行之间坐标隔了128；

(k_mod_32 & ~1) * 2 是32个k index内部增长规则的偏移，k=0，offset=0；k=1，offset=0；k=2，offset=4；k=3， offset=4；k=4，offset=8...

S4 to S8 burst8 pack

展开源码 
void pack_int4_to_int32_S8_map(uint32_t *Pint4, uint32_t *Pack, int32_t K_align, int32_t W_align) {
    // uint32_t *Pint4 = (uint32_t *)torchBInt4.data_ptr();
    // uint32_t *Pack = (uint32_t *)torchBInt32Pack.data_ptr();
    // original: base_index = (k / 64) * 512 + ((k % 64) / 32) * 256 + (k & 0x1) * 128 + last_index;
    const int32_t K8 = K_align / 8;
    for (int32_t w = 0; w < W_align; w++) {
        uint32_t *Pint4_col = Pint4 + w;
        uint32_t *Pack_col = Pack + w;
        for (int32_t k = 0; k < K8; k++) {
            // Precompute reusable components
            int32_t k_div_64 = k >> 6;           // k / 64
            int32_t k_mod_64 = k & 0x3F;         // k % 64
            int32_t k_mod_32 = k & 0x1F;         // k % 32
            int32_t last_index = (k_mod_32 & ~1) * 2;  // Round down to even, then *2
            int32_t base_index = k_div_64 * 512 +
                                (k_mod_64 >> 5) * 256 +   // (k % 64) / 32
                                (k & 1) * 128 +
                                last_index;
            // Stride by W_align
            uint32_t val0 = (Pint4_col[base_index * W_align] + 8) & 0xF;
            uint32_t val1 = ((Pint4_col[(base_index + 1) * W_align] + 8) & 0xF) << 4;
            uint32_t val2 = ((Pint4_col[(base_index + 2) * W_align] + 8) & 0xF) << 8;
            uint32_t val3 = ((Pint4_col[(base_index + 3) * W_align] + 8) & 0xF) << 12;
            uint32_t val4 = ((Pint4_col[(base_index + 64) * W_align] + 8) & 0xF) << 16;
            uint32_t val5 = ((Pint4_col[(base_index + 65) * W_align] + 8) & 0xF) << 20;
            uint32_t val6 = ((Pint4_col[(base_index + 66) * W_align] + 8) & 0xF) << 24;
            uint32_t val7 = ((Pint4_col[(base_index + 67) * W_align] + 8) & 0xF) << 28;

            Pack_col[k * W_align] = val0 | val1 | val2 | val3 | val4 | val5 | val6 | val7;

            printf("222222 {out_index:%d, base_index: %d, int32_k: %d, w: %d}, data0: %d, data1: %d, data2: %d, data3: %d, data4: %d, data5: %d, data6: %d, data7: %d \n", 
                k * W_align + w, base_index, k, w,
                Pint4[(base_index + 0) * W_align + w],
                Pint4[(base_index + 1) * W_align + w],
                Pint4[(base_index + 2) * W_align + w],
                Pint4[(base_index + 3) * W_align + w],
                Pint4[(base_index + 64) * W_align + w],
                Pint4[(base_index + 65) * W_align + w],
                Pint4[(base_index + 66) * W_align + w],
                Pint4[(base_index + 67) * W_align + w]
                ); 

        }
    }
}

device侧 unpack代码

bf16 s8 unpack

展开源码 
__forceinline__ __device__ void convertInt32ToS8_x(__short_vector<uint32_t, 4> sv, __short_vector<S8, 8> &out0) {
    out0.d0 = ((sv.x & 0x0000000f)) - 8;
    out0.d1 = ((sv.x & 0x000000f0) >> 4) - 8;
    out0.d2 = ((sv.x & 0x00000f00) >> 8) - 8;
    out0.d3 = ((sv.x & 0x0000f000) >> 12) - 8;
    out0.d4 = ((sv.x & 0x000f0000) >> 16) - 8;
    out0.d5 = ((sv.x & 0x00f00000) >> 20) - 8;
    out0.d6 = ((sv.x & 0x0f000000) >> 24) - 8;
    out0.d7 = ((sv.x & 0xf0000000) >> 28) - 8;
}

__forceinline__ __device__ void convertInt32ToS8_y(__short_vector<uint32_t, 4> sv, __short_vector<S8, 8> &out0) {
    out0.d0 = ((sv.y & 0x0000000f)) - 8;
    out0.d1 = ((sv.y & 0x000000f0) >> 4) - 8;
    out0.d2 = ((sv.y & 0x00000f00) >> 8) - 8;
    out0.d3 = ((sv.y & 0x0000f000) >> 12) - 8;
    out0.d4 = ((sv.y & 0x000f0000) >> 16) - 8;
    out0.d5 = ((sv.y & 0x00f00000) >> 20) - 8;
    out0.d6 = ((sv.y & 0x0f000000) >> 24) - 8;
    out0.d7 = ((sv.y & 0xf0000000) >> 28) - 8;
}

__forceinline__ __device__ void convertInt32ToS8_z(__short_vector<uint32_t, 4> sv, __short_vector<S8, 8> &out0) {
    out0.d0 = ((sv.z & 0x0000000f)) - 8;
    out0.d1 = ((sv.z & 0x000000f0) >> 4) - 8;
    out0.d2 = ((sv.z & 0x00000f00) >> 8) - 8;
    out0.d3 = ((sv.z & 0x0000f000) >> 12) - 8;
    out0.d4 = ((sv.z & 0x000f0000) >> 16) - 8;
    out0.d5 = ((sv.z & 0x00f00000) >> 20) - 8;
    out0.d6 = ((sv.z & 0x0f000000) >> 24) - 8;
    out0.d7 = ((sv.z & 0xf0000000) >> 28) - 8;
}
__forceinline__ __device__ void convertInt32ToS8_w(__short_vector<uint32_t, 4> sv, __short_vector<S8, 8> &out0) {
    out0.d0 = ((sv.w & 0x0000000f)) - 8;
    out0.d1 = ((sv.w & 0x000000f0) >> 4) - 8;
    out0.d2 = ((sv.w & 0x00000f00) >> 8) - 8;
    out0.d3 = ((sv.w & 0x0000f000) >> 12) - 8;
    out0.d4 = ((sv.w & 0x000f0000) >> 16) - 8;
    out0.d5 = ((sv.w & 0x00f00000) >> 20) - 8;
    out0.d6 = ((sv.w & 0x0f000000) >> 24) - 8;
    out0.d7 = ((sv.w & 0xf0000000) >> 28) - 8;
}
